'''Troomis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] agent.

==Biography==
Troomis was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as an [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] agent. His [[Troomis' sister|sister]] had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] after an altercation with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Creeve]]. Under the guise of a slovenly, dim-witted but amiable [[Technician/Legends|technician]], Troomis gathered intelligence for the Alliance, waiting for the chance to reveal himself and revenge himself on Captain Creeve.<ref name="RASB" />

By placing a [[recording device]] on a [[comm unit booster]] in the base he was stationed at, Troomis obtained information about the movement of the Imperial fleet in [[Oplovis sector/Legends|Oplovis sector]], which was preparing an attack on [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]]. This information was sent on to Alliance Intelligence, and as a result, [[Chief of Intelligence/Legends|Chief of Intelligence]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vernan (general)|Vernan]] was able to prepare a counterattack to stop the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet]].<ref name="RASB" />
